title: Fresh olGhasts
body:
[EN]\
Old-styled ghasts and harnesses textures from [Ol' ghasts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ol-ghasts) for [FreshAnimations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)\
Requires Optifine or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[RU]\
Старые текстуры гастов и упряжей из [Ol' ghasts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ol-ghasts) для [FreshAnimations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)\
Требует Optifine или [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

Discord: ananaz1k
